description: BOM_TS 단어 사전 — 식별자의 최소 단위

description_i18n.en: A financial record of transactions and balances for a trading entity.
Currently in progress or in an operational state; not passive.
A component that connects two otherwise incompatible systems or devices, facilitating communication or data transfer.
Occurring later in time or sequence.
A software application, typically a small one designed for a mobile device.

description_i18n.ko: 브로커 API 인증 토큰 발급·갱신 (KIS OAuth, Upbit JWT 등)
description_i18n.en: Proof of identity required to access a resource, such as a broker API token.

The current asset value in an account.
A candlestick representing a period of trading activity, typically showing the open, high, low, and close prices.
An automated program that performs tasks without human intervention.
A temporary increase in price after a fall, especially in a stock or currency market.

description_i18n.ko: 직전 N봉 고가를 현재가가 상향 돌파하는 진입 패턴
description_i18n.en: A trading pattern where the price moves beyond a predefined support or resistance level.

The act or an instance of acquiring an asset in exchange for money or its equivalent.
An entity considered for selection or appointment to a specific role or position within the trading system.
A single unit of price movement on a candlestick chart.
The total amount of money in an investment system.
A classification or grouping of items based on shared characteristics or criteria, used for market analysis or organization.
A systematic presentation of data, often used for visualization in financial trading systems.

description_i18n.ko: 종목 또는 시장 상황에 대한 분류 결과

description_i18n.ko: 주문, 거래 또는 프로세스가 종료되었음을 나타내는 상태

Class object or classifier; in Python, the first argument of a class method referring to the class itself.
A group of data points that are close to each other, often representing a pattern or segment in the data.

description_i18n.ko: 종목 코드 또는 기타 식별 코드
description_i18n.en: A unique identifier or set of characters used to represent a financial instrument, market, or data.

description_i18n.ko: UI 또는 보고서에 사용되는 색상 설정
description_i18n.en: A setting for a color used in UI elements or reports.
An instruction or order given to a system or program.
A fee charged by a broker or agent for executing a transaction.
Shared by or affecting all members of a group or community; widely prevalent.

description_i18n.ko: 작업 또는 프로세스가 완료되었음을 나타내는 상태
description_i18n.en: Indicates a state where a task or process has been finished and all its required steps have been executed.

description_i18n.en: The central or most important part of a system, process, or component.

Following in succession, without interruption, in a trading or logical sequence.

Occurring, done, or produced every day.
A graphical user interface providing an overview of key metrics and information, often used for monitoring and control.
Database; a structured data store used to persist and query application or trading data.
To reject an entry into a system or process, often due to unmet conditions.
The orientation of a trade or signal (e.g., buy or sell).
Data Source Name; a connection string or identifier used to specify database connection parameters.
To activate or allow a feature, system, or process to operate.
The point in time or space at which something ceases to exist or function.

description_i18n.ko: 시스템의 핵심 처리 로직을 담당하는 부분

description_i18n.ko: End of Day 장 마감 시점

An occurrence or incident that takes place within the system, often triggering subsequent actions or state changes.

To run or execute a program, command, or trade.

To make something happen, often overriding resistance or default behavior, as in forcefully closing a trade.
A financial contract obligating the buyer to purchase a commodity or asset, or the seller to sell it, at a predetermined future date and price.
Prefix indicating foreign exchange or currency markets.
A component or system that produces or creates output, such as data, signals, or energy.

description_i18n.ko: 특정 종목 선정 기준 또는 신호

description_i18n.en: A subroutine or object responsible for processing a specific event or situation in a program.

Pertaining to a specific location, as opposed to remote or distributed.

Simulating trading or financial operations without using real money.

A self-contained unit of code encapsulating specific functionality or responsibility within the system.

description_i18n.en: A defined period of time, often used in charting or data analysis for trading.

description_i18n.ko: 시스템 또는 특정 작업에서 사용되는 표준 시간대 설정입니다.

description_i18n.ko: 인증 또는 세션 관리에 사용되는 보안 토큰입니다.

Indicating the highest position, value, or quality, often used in financial contexts for peak prices.

description_i18n.ko: 종목이나 상품의 거래 가능 여부 또는 수준을 나타내는 지표입니다.
description_i18n.en: The property or degree to which an asset or instrument can be traded in the market.
A particular instance of buying or selling, or a series of related transactions executed as a single investment.

description_i18n.ko: 매매 거래 행위 또는 거래 관련
description_i18n.en: The activity of buying and selling financial instruments.

A trailing stop-loss order is a type of stop-loss order that is set at a specific distance below the market price for a buy position, or above the market price for a sell position. As the market price moves in the favorable direction, the stop-loss price follows it, locking in profits. However, if the market price moves in the unfavorable direction, the stop-loss price remains stationary, protecting the trader from further losses.
An atomic operation, such as a database modification or message transfer, guaranteed to complete entirely or not at all.

description_i18n.ko: 상태 머신 등에서 한 상태에서 다른 상태로의 변화를 나타냅니다.
description_i18n.en: The act or process of changing from one state, system, or condition to another.
The general direction of market prices over a period of time.
A classification or category used to group items or concepts based on shared characteristics.

description_i18n.ko: 거래 대상이 되는 종목 또는 자산의 집합입니다.
description_i18n.en: The set of all tradable assets or instruments considered within a trading system.
In finance, a profit or loss that has not yet been converted into cash; hypothetical.
Upbit; a major Korean cryptocurrency exchange platform used for crypto asset trading.
Higher in position, rank, or level, often referring to a market boundary or indicator.
Uniform Resource Locator; a web address that identifies the location of a resource on the internet.
( informal ) The relationship (usually romantic ) between the speaker and listener or some other unspecified person.
The total monetary worth of shares or contracts traded during a specific period.
A symbolic name or identifier associated with a value that can change, typically used in programming to store data.
The degree of variation of a trading price series over time, usually measured by the standard deviation of logarithmic returns.

A structured set of data arranged in rows and columns, typically used in databases or for displaying information.
A financial agreement between two or more parties to exchange an asset at a specified future date at a predetermined price.
The result of effort or a specific task performed.
To annul or invalidate a previously placed order or instruction.

description_i18n.ko: 어떤 이벤트나 상태가 최종적으로 확인되었음을 나타내는 플래그
